prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业涉及计算机类（社会热度高热推荐）、数学类（推荐）、教育学类（分化观望）等；师范/教育大类热 度2022年达峰值后持续降温（2024年），但计算机、电子信息等工科专业热度持续走高；湖北省2026年物理类考生约25.14万人，较2025年24.98万人小幅增加 约0.6%，竞争略有加剧；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，属跨省就读；该校在湖北省招生计划占比较小（物理类33–47人）， 地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招12.12%对竞争的部分缓解、湖北省物理类考生小幅增加以及学校声誉偏正面等因素，在2025 年基准24832名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约26688名，区间26188–27188名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 18452 → 18293 → 20215 → 19063 → 24832. In the past three years, the ranking has continuously shifted backward. In 2025, it shifted backward by about 5769 places compared to 2024, reaching the lowest baseline ranking of about 24832 in the past five years, indicating a clear trend of intensified competition. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province for Physics Category was 47 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 33 in 2025, showing a year-by-year reduction. In 2026, the plan is 37, an increase of 4 students (+12.12%) compared to 2025. After the expansion, competitive pressure slightly eases, but the expansion is insufficient to fully offset the recent trend of ranking backwardness.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 48th, with a stable ranking range of 44–53 in recent years, making it a nationally renowned normal university. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat positive, mainly due to the high popularity of its master's programs (planned enrollment of 3100, estimated applicants exceeding 15,000, with an admission ratio of about 5:1), showing strong popularity in the field of education. On Douyin, its popularity ranking is 67th, with an average evaluation, indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms. No obvious signal of abnormal historical admission records has been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Northeast Normal University has 6 disciplines rated A- or above: Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, and Biology A-. Among them, Marxist Theory, Education, and World History are A+, placing the university's disciplinary strength at the forefront among normal universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors include Computer Science (high social popularity, highly recommended), Mathematics (recommended), Education (differentiated, wait-and-see), etc. The popularity of the normal/education major category peaked in 2022 and has been cooling down since (2024), but the popularity of engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continues to rise. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei Province is about 251,400, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 249,800 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, which is an inter-provincial study. The university's enrollment plan in Hubei Province accounts for a small proportion (33–47 students for Physics Category), so regional preference has a limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the partial relief of competition from the 12.12% enrollment expansion in 2026, the slight increase in Physics Category examinees in Hubei Province, and the somewhat positive reputation of the university, the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward based on the 2025 baseline of 24832. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 26688, with a range of 26188–27188.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Physics (Teacher Training; Lu Jiaxi Experimental Class)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Teacher Training), Statistics)
- Chemistry (Teacher Training; Zheng Ruli Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Educational Technology)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science (Teacher Training), Biotechnology)
- Education (Teacher Training; Education, Primary Education, Preschool Education).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (Finance, Accounting, Human Resource Management, Economics, Marketing)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering, Ecology)
- Geographical Sciences (Geographical Science (Teacher Training), Geographic Information Science, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 26188–27188, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Education) as the main application direction. Tier 1 majors (Physics Experimental Class, Mathematics, Chemistry Experimental Class) can be considered as reach choices, while Tier 3 majors (Economics, Environmental, Geography) serve as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<26188), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship experimental classes.
